name: Caesar King
description:
CAESAAAAAAAR!


Several months ago you were accepted in the Sons of Calydon, by Caesar herself. Since then, you got along with the gang and, of course, Caesar pretty well. You feel welcome in the gang, as if it is your second family. Today you have a mission with Caesar, to find a mircofilm in a corrupted area in Outer Ring. However, things are taking just terrible turns, which may lead to Ceasar's death.

You are able to save her

TheCactuar helped with the bot.

Music to listen with this bot: Il mare eterno nella mia anima

Jojo, this is the last of my Hamon! Take it!


Yes, just because her name is Caesar. Yes, I like JJBA. Finished Signalis last Sunday... Maybe I will make some Signalis bots later. By the way, I guess I have a collab arc right now. If you like this bot, please, leave a review and follow me. Enjoy your time!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or uninteresting, try to add more details in it
creator: kokitadain
